appraisal_events.evidence: « on ne tenait plus compte de ses exclusives qu'une fois sur deux, et [...] il avait commencé à [...] baisser [...] ses prix »; « ce Don Quichotte s'était battu contre tant de moulins à vent »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Charlus as losing enforcement power over his social 'exclusives' and compromising out of fear of being the one excluded, diminishing his authority and prestige.

status_effects.explanation: His local standing is weakened as his vetoes are no longer reliably obeyed and he is depicted as having to compromise.
